pathNew.title: Launch a new site
pathNew.desc: Provision a fresh relay site in one click — pick an engine and version, and the panel brings it up with an isolated database and admin account. No server access needed.

pathAdopt.title: Connect an existing site
pathAdopt.desc: Already running a relay site? Connect it with its URL and an admin credential. The panel manages it through the admin API only — nothing is migrated or modified, and you can keep it read-only.

pathBilling.title: Pick a plan
pathBilling.desc: Your plan sets how many sites you can run or connect. Subscribe or renew any time — payment is self-serve and the quota applies immediately.

supportIntro: Questions, billing issues, or something not working? Reach us through any channel below.
noSupportConfigured: Support contact has not been configured yet.
supportUrlHint: Ticketing or contact page shown to operators

faq.q1: Does connecting an existing site change it in any way?
faq.a1: No. Connect only verifies the URL and admin credential, then stores the credential encrypted. The panel talks to your site exclusively through its public admin API; enable read-only mode and it will not perform any write at all.
faq.q2: What counts toward my site quota?
faq.a2: Every non-destroyed site you own — both sites provisioned by the panel and existing sites you connected.
faq.a3: After you pay, the panel verifies the order directly with the payment channel and activates the subscription automatically, usually within seconds. If a paid order does not activate, contact support with the order number.
faq.q4: Can I move a connected site to full management later?
faq.a4: Yes. Turn off read-only in the site's settings to allow channel, user and branding management from the panel. Container lifecycle (start/stop/upgrade) remains available only for panel-provisioned sites.
